title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.225 - Mark Twain Day designated for November 30
text:
9.225.  Mark Twain Day designated for November 30. — November thirtieth of each year is hereby designated as "Mark Twain Day".  The citizens of this state are encouraged to engage in appropriate events and activities to commemorate the life and accomplishments of Mark Twain.
(L. 2021 S.B. 72)
